relevantFacts: The native installer is the recommended install method for macOS, Linux, and WSL.
The native installer command is curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash.
Claude Code installation should be verified with claude --version.
The npm package uses per-platform optional dependencies and a postinstall step to link the native binary.
The npm package pulls the native binary through a per-platform optional dependency.
If optional dependencies are skipped, there is no JavaScript fallback.
Installation problems with npm can be worked around by switching to the native installer.
For security, Bun does not execute lifecycle scripts of installed dependencies unless the package is trusted.
Bun blocks arbitrary dependency lifecycle scripts such as postinstall.
bun pm trust can allow lifecycle scripts for a specific package in a project package.json.
